title: Get calculated formula values via API request
excerpt: I’m glad to see the plans for including formula columns in automations. On the topic of formula columns, it’s currently not possible to bring in calculated values via API request. Is this a possibility in the future, inc…

posts.author: Rosalind90 (Rosalind Causey)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m glad to see the plans for including formula columns in automations. On the topic of formula columns, it’s currently not possible to bring in calculated values via API request. Is this a possibility in the future, including when the formula contains mirrored columns?

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: I see that this is marked as coming soon. Are there any further details of timescales @Matias.Monday ???
